original_prompt: migrate the database to an FB RTDB - make sure that all the data entities are normalized - transactions like [user history/ audit history] are in their on tablas in the db - joins will happen on the server based on if the: /entity/$id: Contains only the essentials and forign ids, things that dont change often /entity_history/$uid: Contains the transactional data.
rephrased_goal: Migrate from Firestore to Realtime Database with a dual-path normalization strategy, using server-side logic to join essential data and transactional history.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Initialize RTDB in server.js and update health check
subtasks_required: Import getDatabase from firebase-admin/database
Add databaseURL to initializeApp
Update /api/health to check rtdb connectivity
Hit /api/health endpoint
Inspect server logs for successful DB connection
tasks.testing_criteria: Server starts and health check passes.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Implement Normalization Schemas and Helpers
subtasks_required: Define SCHEMAS with essential fields for users, vans, items, appointments, product_types, roles, forms
Implement getNormalized(col, id) for server-side join
Implement saveNormalized(col, id, data) for dual-path storage
tasks.testing_criteria: Helpers handle essentials and history paths correctly.

subtasks_required: Verify timestamp conversion to ISO in getNormalized
Verify server value timestamp injection in saveNormalized
tasks.testing_criteria: Data structure matches expectations in RTDB.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Migrate Generic CRUD Routes to RTDB
subtasks_required: Update app.get(/api/:col) to fetch and combine normalized docs
Update app.get(/api/:col/:id) to use getNormalized
Update app.post(/api/:col) to use saveNormalized
Update app.put(/api/:col/:id) to use saveNormalized
Update app.delete(/api/:col/:id) to remove from essentials path
tasks.testing_criteria: All CRUD endpoints operational with RTDB.

subtasks_required: Perform test POST and verify split into /col and /col_history
Perform test GET and verify joined result
tasks.testing_criteria: Data is correctly stored and retrieved.

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Update Trigger Engine for RTDB
subtasks_required: Modify runTriggers to fetch definitions from RTDB 'triggers' path
Update trigger evaluation to use RTDB objects
tasks.testing_criteria: Triggers fire based on RTDB data changes.

subtasks_required: Run an update that should match a trigger
Observe action execution in logs
tasks.testing_criteria: Trigger logic is sound with RTDB.

subtasks_required: Grep for any remaining 'db.' or 'collection(' calls in server.js
Verify all collections in `collections` array are included
Update wiki.json with new architecture
